services.name: Azure Front Door
services.description: Global entry point with multi-region traffic routing and failover.

services.name: App Service
services.description: Hosts e-commerce web/API application across regions.

services.name: Azure Event Grid
services.description: Distributes order domain events to downstream processors.

services.name: Azure Functions
services.description: Processes asynchronous order events and updates order state.

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.description: Globally replicated product catalog and order metadata store.

services.name: Azure Cache for Redis
services.description: Low-latency session and cart cache for shoppers.

services.name: Key Vault
services.description: Stores application secrets, keys, and connection credentials.

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Collects primary application metrics and alerts.

services.name: Log Analytics
services.description: Central workspace for querying operational logs.

connections.label: Route shopper HTTP requests to healthiest regional app endpoint
Validate user sign-in and acquire access tokens for checkout sessions
Retrieve API keys and database credentials at runtime
Read and update cart/session state for active shoppers
Query global product catalog and persist order documents
Publish OrderPlaced events after successful checkout
Trigger serverless order processing handlers per event subscription
Update order status and reserve inventory records
Emit OrderProcessed and OrderFailed lifecycle events
Deliver order lifecycle notifications to application webhook endpoint
Send application performance metrics and request telemetry
Ingest and retain platform/application logs for analysis

workflow.description: Customer traffic enters globally and is sent to the best available regional app instance.
Application authenticates the user and retrieves required secrets before serving commerce actions.
Product pages and carts are served using global catalog data and low-latency session cache.
On checkout, order data is stored and an OrderPlaced event is published for downstream processing.
Event Grid pushes order events to Functions, which execute fulfillment and status logic.
Functions write updated order/inventory state and publish lifecycle events for application consumption.
Application receives lifecycle notifications and exposes updated order state to customers.
Primary application telemetry is centralized for alerting and log analytics.

metadata.prompt: A multi-region e-commerce system with Cosmos DB for global product catalog, Azure Front Door for traffic routing, Redis Cache for sessions, and Event Grid for order processing
